title: Build submissions export API generating .xlsx downloads
completion_summary: Built submissions export API with .xlsx generation using SheetJS. 10-column spreadsheet with session auth and same filters as list API.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/admin/submissions/export verifies session and resolves store (401 if invalid)
Accepts optional query params: ?quizId=, ?from=, ?to=, ?search= for filtering (same as list page)
Queries Submission records scoped to storeId with filters applied
Generates .xlsx file using a library (e.g., exceljs or xlsx) with proper Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers
Excel columns: Date, Quiz, Email, Name, Phone, Session ID, Result Title, Recommended Products, IP Address
Parses answers JSON column into human-readable format (question: answer per row or flattened columns)
Parses recommendedProducts JSON column into comma-separated product titles
Handles empty result set gracefully (empty spreadsheet with headers only)
Follows existing resolveStore pattern for session auth
Response streams the file (no in-memory buffering for large datasets)
